title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is an Anthropic feature that generates website prototypes, landing pages, and UI components from text prompts. Users can create designs by selecting between Prototype, Slide Deck, Templates, and Custom options, then download the generated code for immediate use.
